header_intro: Explore curated moments capturing authentic stories, milestones, and portraits across the beautiful landscapes of the White Mountains.

sections.title: Senior Portraits
sections.description: Relaxed, fun, and authentic sessions designed to capture your true personality and celebrate this incredible milestone against stunning mountain vistas.

sections.title: Couples & Romance
sections.description: Intimate, unposed storytelling celebrating your unique connection. Perfect for anniversaries, adventurous dates, or just capturing your love story.

sections.title: Engagement Sessions
sections.description: Bespoke engagement photography tailored to your favorite locations. Let's capture the excitement and joy of your journey toward marriage.

sections.title: Family Gatherings
sections.description: Timeless family portraits filled with genuine laughter, warm embraces, and beautiful candids that your family will treasure for generations.

sections.title: Maternity Portraits
sections.description: Celebrating the breathtaking beauty and quiet anticipation of new life with elegant, luminous portraits in natural light settings.

sections.title: Pet Photography
sections.description: Paws, claws, and personality! Fun, patient sessions dedicated entirely to capturing the unique character and spirit of your beloved pets.

sections.title: Event Photography
sections.description: Documenting your special celebrations, milestones, and community gatherings with a documentary approach that lets you live completely in the moment.

sections.title: Seasonal Mini Sessions
sections.description: Short, perfectly themed sessions hosted throughout the year to capture quick family updates, holiday cards, and beautiful fast-changing seasons.
